    1. GameStateData(PlayerData, PlayerData, boolean, List, List, int, int, int, String)

Klasse GameStateData

java.lang.Object
persistance.GameStateData
public class GameStateData extends Object
Represents a snapshot of the game state at a particular moment.

    Creates a new GameStateData capturing the current game state.

  • Konstruktordetails

    • GameStateData

      public GameStateData(PlayerData whiteData, PlayerData blackData, boolean currentIsWhite, List<MoveData> undoMoves, List<MoveData> redoMoves, int noMillTurnCounter, int timePerTurn, int timeLeft, String gameMode)
      Creates a new GameStateData capturing the current game state.
      Parameter:
      whiteData - The data of the white player.
      blackData - The data of the black player.
      currentIsWhite - Indicates if it's currently the white player's turn.
      undoMoves - The list of moves that can be undone.
      redoMoves - The list of moves that can be redone.
      noMillTurnCounter - The number of consecutive turns without a formed mill.
      timePerTurn - The time allocated for each turn in seconds.
      timeLeft - The remaining time for the current player in seconds.
      gameMode - The mode of the game (e.g., "singleplayer" or "multiplayer").
